form.title: Personal Information
form.terms: I accept the Terms and Conditions

error.general: A registration error occurred. Please try again.

sidebar.title: Payment Summary
sidebar.feeExplanation: The Selection Process Fee is the first mandatory payment on the MatriculaUSA platform. It unlocks your full access to view all scholarships and start your application process.
sidebar.refundAssuranceText: If you are not accepted to any partner university, your selection process fee will be fully refunded.
sidebar.futureFeesNote: Future fees are estimates and vary by university.

terms.selfieSubtitle: To complete the contract acceptance, we need a selfie of you holding your ID document.
terms.selfieStep1: Hold your ID next to your face

zelle.title: Payment with Zelle
zelle.subtitle: Follow the instructions below to complete your payment.

notes.parcelowFees: * May include carrier and platform processing fees
notes.zelleTime: Processing can take up to 48 hours

cpf.label: Enter your CPF (Required for Parcelow)
cpf.error: CPF is required for Parcelow payment.

error.generationFailed: Failed to generate payment link. Please try again.

alreadyPaid.title: Fee Already Paid!
alreadyPaid.description: You have already paid the selection process fee. You can proceed with your application.

processType.title: Visa Situation
processType.subtitle: Select the option that best describes your current situation regarding the US visa.
processType.lockedError: You have already passed the review. It is not possible to change the process type.
processType.saveError: Error saving selection. Please try again.

completed.title: Process Type
completed.subtitle: Process type successfully selected.
completed.description: You have already selected your process type and passed the review. This step is complete.

initial.label: First F-1 Visa (Initial)
initial.description: You have never had an F-1 student visa or are applying for the first time.

transfer.label: F-1 Visa Transfer
transfer.description: You already have an active F-1 visa and wish to transfer from another school in the US.

changeOfStatus.label: Change of Status
changeOfStatus.description: You have another type of visa (B-2, H-1B, etc.) and wish to change to F-1.

resident.label: Resident
resident.description: You already have U.S. citizenship or permanent residence (Green Card).

approvedApps.title: Select your Scholarship
approvedApps.subtitle: Step completed successfully.
approvedApps.scholarshipSelectedPost: and the application fee has been paid.

review.title: Applications Under Review
review.subtitle: Your documents are being reviewed. You can track the status of each scholarship below.
review.titleApproved: Congratulations! You have been accepted. Select the university below to proceed with the payment.

cards.rejectionNote: Important: Rejected documents can be resubmitted for a new analysis.

confirmSelectionModal.title: Confirm Selection
confirmSelectionModal.description: This decision is final. By confirming, you will no longer be able to change the scholarship selected for this application process.

instructions.title: Important Instructions
instructions.descriptionPre: Ensure that the submitted documents are completely legible and
instructions.descriptionMid: . If you need certified and quality translation, we recommend the services of our partner

acceptance.lockMessage: You need to pay <0>{{feeName}}</0> before your acceptance letter can be released.

packageFees.confirmedMessage: Your payment has been confirmed. You can now proceed to the acceptance letter.

selectionSurvey.identityVerificationSubtitle: To ensure the security of the selection process, we need a selfie with your document before starting the questionnaire.
selectionSurvey.toastPhotoError: Error uploading photo. Please try again.
selectionSurvey.securityNotice: Your data is protected and encrypted
selectionSurvey.identityVerifiedSuccess: You have already submitted your identity photo and it is under review.
selectionSurvey.title: Questionnaire
selectionSurvey.subtitle: Answer carefully. To pass and continue your process, you must achieve at least <0>80% correct</0> on objective questions.
selectionSurvey.sectionsInfo: Answer all mandatory questions to continue.
selectionSurvey.toastErrorFields: Please fill in all mandatory fields before continuing.
selectionSurvey.toastErrorScore: Unfortunately you didn't reach the minimum score. Try again.
selectionSurvey.toastErrorSave: Error saving your answers. Please try again.

results.passedMessage: You are eligible to proceed to scholarship selection and are one step closer to your dream
results.ctaDescription: Now you can continue your process and choose the scholarships you are interested in.
results.failedMessage: You didn't reach the minimum score of 80% required for approval.
results.failedAdvice: We recommend reviewing the support materials and trying again.

3_1.text: What is your main course or field of interest?

3_2.text: What is your current academic level?

4.text: Are you currently in the US?

options.initial: Initial (outside the US, applying for visa/entry with F-1)
options.cos: COS (Change of Status: in the US, changing to F-1 status)
options.resident: Resident (U.S. Citizen or Green Card holder)
options.transfer: Transfer (has/had I-20 and will transfer schools)

5.errorNaoSei: Please select your actual profile (Initial, Transfer, or COS) to continue.

6.text: What is your main goal with the program?

options.b: Just "stay in the US" (without real study)

7.text: Do you have minimum weekly study availability?

8.text: What is your English level today?

9.text: Have you studied in college/university before?
9.extraLabel: What course and in which country?

10.text: Are you willing to follow F-1 visa rules even when inconvenient?

11.text: Do you have a valid passport?

13.text: Can you send a copy of your passport when requested?

14.text: Do you have proof of high school or higher education completion?

options.b: I have it, but I don't know where

15.text: Can you organize your documents in a folder and keep them updated?

16.text: How soon do you want to start the program?

17.text: Can you participate in an alignment interview with the team?

18.text: Do you understand that the process has steps and skipping them causes delays and risks?

19.text: Do you check your email daily?

20.text: What usually happens if you delay documents or payments?

21.text: Why is proof of funds required?

options.a: Because the government wants to interfere
options.b: Because the school wants to interfere
options.c: Because you must prove you can pay tuition and living costs for at least 1 year

options.a: Demonstrate financial capacity and reduce status violation risk
options.b: Ensure you will work in the US

23.text: For the main applicant, what is the minimum value you must prove?

24.text: For each additional dependent, what is the approximate minimum value?

25.text: Does the proof of funds need to be in your name?

options.a: Always must be in my name
options.b: Can be from a sponsor, if provable and consistent

26.text: Can you arrange the necessary amount (yours or sponsor) for proof?

options.c: Not yet, but in X months

27.text: Do you understand that tuition and process fees are different things?

28.text: If you have a scholarship, the goal is to reduce tuition — it doesn't eliminate your responsibility to pay and maintain status.

29.text: Which payment method is easiest for you?

30.text: What is your approximate annual budget for tuition + process costs?

31.text: The goal of the F-1 visa is:

options.a: A school document proving eligibility/enrollment and sustaining F-1 status
options.c: A visa stuck in the passport

options.a: Comply with rules, attendance, minimum load, and program obligations
options.b: Pay nothing and show up sometimes

34.text: If I miss lots of classes and stop studying, I can:

options.a: Risk my status and face immigration consequences

35.text: For any critical decisions (travel, move, break), I should:

options.a: Consult the school/DSO and follow guidance
Change status while in the US
options.b: Buy a ticket and enter as a tourist

options.a: Change/transfer SEVIS/I-20 from one school to another
Process for those outside the US entering with F-1
options.b: Those already studying who want to transfer
options.c: Those changing status within the US
options.d: Those who don't want to study

39.text: Working without authorization while F-1 is:

options.a: A serious risk that can harm status

40.text: If I'm confused about an F-1 rule, I should:

options.a: Officially ask the school/DSO or team
options.c: Ask in a random WhatsApp group

options.a: Meet deadlines, attendance, clear communication, and consistency
options.c: Not reading emails and complaining later

42.text: To not miss deadlines in the US, the best habit is:

options.a: Use calendar + reminders + check email daily

43.text: If I'm struggling with a subject, I should first:

44.text: Networking at university, correctly, serves to:

options.a: Open academic and professional doors within rules

45.text: What usually leads to failure: lack of intelligence or lack of consistency?

46.text: What is your most important priority right now?

47.text: Do you accept feedback and correction during the process and program?

48.text: Minimum commitment: "I commit to maintain attendance, meet deadlines, and follow F-1 rules."

49.text: Write your weekly study plan (days + hours)
49.placeholder: Describe your study days and times...

50.prompt: "I understand that my result depends on my discipline. If I don't follow the plan, I can harm my status and my project."

applicationFee.title: Confirm Your Scholarship Selection
applicationFee.subtitle: Choose your payment method and secure your scholarship
applicationFee.feeDescription: Fee to secure your approved scholarship spot
applicationFee.warningText: By proceeding with this payment, you're making this your final scholarship choice. This action cannot be undone.

scholarshipFee.title: Scholarship Fee Payment
scholarshipFee.subtitle: Choose your payment method to complete your enrollment
scholarshipFee.feeDescription: Final fee to complete your scholarship enrollment
scholarshipFee.warningText: By proceeding with this payment, you're completing your scholarship enrollment.

stripe.title: Stripe
stripe.description: Pay securely with credit or debit card

reinstatementFeeStep.title: Reinstatement Fee
reinstatementFeeStep.subtitle: To proceed with your transfer process, payment of the reinstatement fee is required.
reinstatementFeeStep.confirmedMessage: Your reinstatement fee has been successfully confirmed.
